content: Akela feel karna bohot common hai. Studies kehte hain ki 60% young adults kabhi na kabhi lonely feel karte hain. Iska matlab ye nahi ki tum weak ho — bas thoda connection chahiye. Kisi se baat karo, chahe chhoti si baat ho.
Anxiety mein deep breathing bohot kaam karti hai. 4-7-8 technique try kar: 4 second inhale, 7 second hold, 8 second exhale. Ye nervous system ko calm karta hai. Roz 5 minute practice karna start kar.

Stress normal hai, lekin zyada stress harmful hai. Break lena zaroori hai — even 10 minute walk se cortisol level kam hota hai. Apne kaam ko chhote tasks mein tod, ek ek karke kar. Sab ek saath karne ki zaroorat nahi.
Udaas hona ek natural emotion hai, isse dabana mat. Kabhi kabhi rone se bhi acha lagta hai — ye body ka release mechanism hai. Apne feelings ko accept karna pehla step hai better feel karne ka.
Self-care selfish nahi hai, zaroori hai. Basic cheezein: 7-8 ghante neend, din mein 2-3 litre paani, thoda sunlight, aur koi ek cheez jo tujhe khush kare. Chhoti chhoti cheezein bada fark dalti hain.
Neend bohot important hai mental health ke liye. Screen band kar 30 min pehle sone se. Room thoda dark aur cool rakh. Ek fixed time pe sona try kar — body ki clock set hoti hai isse.
Motivation roz nahi aayega — aur ye normal hai. Discipline motivation se zyada kaam karta hai. Chhota sa start kar, bas 5 minute. Ek baar shuru kiya toh momentum khud aata hai.
Rishte mein ups-downs normal hain. Communication sabse important hai — apni feelings clearly bol, mind-reading expect mat kar. Aur suno bhi dhyan se. Kabhi kabhi space dena bhi pyaar hota hai.
Gussa aana normal hai, lekin react karne se pehle 10 second ruk. Deep breath le. Gusse mein boli gayi baatein wapas nahi aati. Baad mein baat kar jab calm ho — tab better communicate kar payega.
Exam ka stress sabko hota hai. Pomodoro technique use kar: 25 min padhai, 5 min break. Notes mein key points likh, pura chapter mat ratna. Aur haan — ek exam se life decide nahi hoti, yaad rakh.
Confidence ek skill hai, personality trait nahi. Chhoti chhoti wins celebrate kar. Mirror mein khud se bol: 'Main kar sakta hoon.' Comparisons band kar — apna pace apna hai.
Roz 3 cheezein likh jo achhi hui — chahe kitni chhoti ho. Gratitude practice se brain ka focus negative se positive pe shift hota hai. Ye scientifically proven hai happiness badhane ke liye.
Social media pe sab apni best life dikhate hain — real life nahi. Compare mat kar. Agar scroll karne ke baad bura lagta hai, toh break le. Notification off kar, apne pace pe use kar.
Overthinking mein ek trick kaam karti hai: apne aap se puchh 'Kya ye 5 saal baad matter karega?' Agar nahi, toh zyada mat soch. Present mein reh, kal ka tension kal dekhenge.
Agar bohot bura lag raha hai aur kisi se baat karni hai, toh iCall helpline pe call kar: 9152987821. AASRA: 9820466726. Ye trained counselors hain jo tujhe samjhenge. Akela mat reh.
